questions.question: Describe the primary differences between interprocess communication (IPC) and interthread communication (ITC) in multi-threaded programming.
questions.hint: Explain the differences between IPC and ITC with example

questions.question: What is the main purpose of a synchronization primitive in multi-threaded programming, and how does it facilitate interprocess communication?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of synchronization and its role in IPC

questions.question: Explain the concept of message passing as a method of interprocess communication in multi-threaded programming, and provide an example of its application.
questions.hint: Provide a concrete example of message passing in a real-world scenario
